overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting vibrant neon advertisements, moderate vehicle traffic, pedestrians, and cyberpunk architecture with elevated highways and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: pedestrian in white shirt crosses the street from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward a crosswalk, passing a parked police car

notable_agents.action: futuristic police car parked on the roadside with glowing blue accents
person crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure overhead with support columns
digital street sign displaying speed limit 40
large holographic advertisement screen showing animated content
tall pole with bright overhead lamp illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city at night. The street is dimly lit by artificial lights, with a police car parked on the right and digital billboards visible ahead. A pedestrian crosses in front as the camera approaches a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk leading to restaurant building

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection
stepping onto the yellow and black striped crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward the Zhiruo restaurant building with the glowing phoenix logo

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction toward the restaurant

entered.detail: red building facade with large glowing phoenix logo and Zhiruo signage
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open intersection. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the distinctive Zhiruo restaurant, which features a large glowing phoenix logo. Other pedestrians cross in the same direction as vehicle traffic waits nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with neon-lit storefronts and urban encampment

events.description: stepping onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk, passing the Zhiruo restaurant
passing a bright vertical pink neon light fixture illuminating the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past the restaurant and an urban encampment with people resting

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground next to stacked crates and belongings

entered.detail: vertical magenta neon light fixture casting pink glow on the wet pavement
modern white outdoor seating benches along the building facade
small illuminated food cart or vendor booth on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk past the Zhiruo restaurant, entering an area with vibrant pink neon lighting. The sidewalk features concrete sections and white benches, with a few people resting near stacked belongings. The wet pavement reflects the magenta and orange neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with elevated train tracks and modern bus shelter

events.description: approaching the intersection and slowing to observe traffic before crossing
futuristic silver sports car drives through the intersection from right to left
crossing the street toward the bus shelter area with glass walls

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing the sports car and other traffic, heading toward the bus shelter

notable_agents.action: sleek silver and black futuristic sports car turning through the intersection
white sedan waiting at the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus stop shelter with illuminated red vertical accent lights
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street overhead
orange tactile paving with yellow stripes marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection with an elevated train track overhead. The camera crosses the street as a futuristic sports car drives past, heading toward a modern glass bus shelter with red neon accents. The area features heavy vehicle traffic and bright street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with bus shelter and neon storefronts

events.description: walking past the glass bus shelter structure and continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the bus shelter and various neon-lit storefronts with closed shutters

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing and hat walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: multiple illuminated business signs including purple and red neon lighting
metal roll-down security shutters covering storefronts with graffiti

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk past the bus shelter, entering an area with closed storefronts covered in metal shutters and vibrant neon signs. The elevated train track remains visible overhead while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and traffic continues along the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the dim shadows of a concrete overpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins beneath the heavy structure of the overpass, passing a parked police car and a crossing pedestrian as the camera moves toward a distant crosswalk. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the viewer crosses yellow-striped pavement toward the glowing phoenix logo of the Zhiruo restaurant. The movement then shifts along the sidewalk, transitioning from the open street into a dense corridor of magenta and orange light. Finally, the camera glides past white benches and resting pedestrians, with the wet pavement reflecting the intense pink neon of the surrounding futuristic architecture.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling, open intersection into a more enclosed urban corridor of neon-lit storefronts. It begins by crossing a wide street beneath an elevated train track, passing a speeding futuristic sports car as the camera heads toward a glass bus shelter accented with red neon. As the camera moves past the shelter, the open space of the intersection gives way to a narrower sidewalk lined with closed storefronts and heavy metal shutters. The scene then shifts focus toward the vibrant neon signs illuminating the facades while pedestrians stream past in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward progression, keeping the overhead train tracks in view as the surrounding architecture becomes more dense and commercial.
